checks.evidence: All 16 locked inputs matched before output writes; the three controlled status records contained only the authorized prepared-contract and execution-approval state.
R6-A remains the sole selected route and grants only preparation of this separately executed bounded rule contract.
R5 replays four exact owned closed intervals and four exact open gaps without mutation.
Step 05 replays the +X, +Y, -X, -Y counterclockwise adjacency order.
Every gap has exactly one predecessor and one successor from the four approved construction-lane labels.
Each m_k is registered only as the exact symbolic rational relation m_k = (a_k + b_k) / 2.
Each lower branch is predecessor-only and remains an unevaluated symbolic relation.
Each midpoint and upper branch is successor-only and remains an unevaluated symbolic relation.
The two half-open relations are symbolically total over each existing open gap.
The two relations are disjoint; no q relation receives two labels.
Every existing R5 lane endpoint remains under unchanged R5 ownership and no gap endpoint is reassigned.
G_3 uses +X only as a successor label; no modulus, wrap, new lane, or endpoint identification exists.
Historical I10-010-A remains unchanged candidate history classified requires_revision.
All 14 back/right records remain proof only and unauthorized for construction.
Every midpoint and branch claim is bounded symbolic interpretation only, never source or physical evidence.
No top/upright owner or top/upright join is defined.
No seam, continuity, interpolation, blend, endpoint join, or closure behavior is defined.
Owner instances, q instances, samples, coordinates, transforms, pairs, fields, fills, surfaces, topology, and geometry remain zero.
No earlier gate failed, so the mandatory BLOCK fallback was not triggered.
Execution changes are bounded to the exact R7 allowlist and zero paths are staged.
Candidate registration and bounded rule approval are true; evaluation, implementation, downstream, staging, commit, and push remain false.
The final post-decision output and handoff were opened in separate visible gedit windows and verified through their exact R7 filenames; no global desktop title list was surfaced.
